title: Workspace
subtitle: Your saved vendors, contracts, and case leads — organized into dossiers.
noItemsMatchDescription: Try adjusting or clearing the active filters to see more results.
noRiskFactorData: No risk factor data available for this vendor.

workspaceEmpty.title: Your investigation starts here.
workspaceEmpty.description: Save vendors, institutions, and contracts to track risk-score changes over time. Begin by watching a high-priority vendor, exploring the procurement data, or opening a documented case.
workspaceEmpty.hint: Use the eye icon on any vendor or institution profile to start tracking.
workspaceEmpty.watchVendorDesc: Track risk changes for high-priority vendors in the ARIA queue.
workspaceEmpty.exploreDesc: Find vendors or institutions and click the eye icon to start tracking.
workspaceEmpty.caseDesc: Browse 1,363 documented cases and add involved parties to your workspace.

dossierEmpty.title: Your investigation starts here.
dossierEmpty.lede: Create a dossier to begin tracking vendors, institutions, and contracts under a single case file.
dossierEmpty.steps: Create a dossier  ·  Add vendors under investigation  ·  Export your findings

dossierTabHeader.lede: Organize your investigations into case folders. Each dossier holds vendors, institutions, and contracts — private to your account, exportable anytime.

tip: Tip: open a vendor from the explorer or the ARIA queue, then use the eye icon to add them to your workspace.
